summary: The CI job failed because a Docker build step could not download the nydus binary from GitHub releases due to an HTTP 502 Bad Gateway error. This caused the `buildx bake` command to fail with a non-zero exit code.
root_cause: A transient network error (HTTP 502 Bad Gateway) occurred when the Docker build tried to wget the nydus-static tarball from github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases, causing the build step to fail.

evidence.quote: wget: server returned error: HTTP/1.1 502 Bad Gateway or Proxy Error
evidence.reason: The wget command received a 502 Bad Gateway response from the server, indicating a transient network/proxy issue.

evidence.quote: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: The Docker build solve step failed because the wget command exited with code 1 due to the network error.

evidence.quote: ##[error]buildx bake failed with: ERROR: failed to solve: process "/bin/bash -c wget https://github.com/dragonflyoss/nydus/releases/download/$NYDUS_VERSION/nydus-static-$NYDUS_VERSION-$TARGETOS-$TARGETARCH.tgz" did not complete successfully: exit code: 1
evidence.reason: This is the top-level GitHub Actions error that caused the job to fail, directly caused by the network failure.

suggested_fix: Re-run the CI job, as this is a transient network failure (HTTP 502). Optionally, add retry logic to the wget command in the Dockerfile (e.g., `wget --tries=3`) to make the build more resilient to transient network errors.
